title: peucedanum terebinthaceum subsp. deltoideum
intro: Peucedanum terebinthaceum subsp. deltoideum is a subspecies of the Peucedanum terebinthaceum plant, also known as a type of carrot fern or tarragon, which belongs to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The plant is used for its medicinal properties, including its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties, which help to expel intestinal parasites and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Peucedanum terebinthaceum subsp. deltoideum include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve menstrual cramps, and support the immune system. Peucedanum terebinthaceum subsp. deltoideum is typically prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and roots are used in herbal medicine.
